creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
Hello Lupe,

There are serveral issues need to clarify.

On Sun, Aug 10, 2008 at 09:21:37PM +0200, Lupe Christoph wrote:
> Hi!
> 
> There is a Big Mistake in this patch - it removes some symlinks from
> etc/munin and it removes etc/VERSION.node, ignoring
> - that those symlinks may not exist on a machine where munin-node is
>   installed,
> - that there may be more symlinks that were not generated by the test
>   installtion, both depending on presence and absence of hardware and
>   software on both machines.
> - that the symlinks are precious and should not be removed by an upgrade
> - that VERSION.node is necessary for an upgrade to function.
> 
> I don't understand why the USE_PERL5 line had to be moved. And I don;t
> understand why Lin does not use %%DATADIR%%. There are quite a few
> differences between my patch and this, and I see no necessity for them,
> but see for example that munin-node should not log into
> /var/log/munin-main.
> 
> Please do not apply this patch.
> 
> Thanks you,
> Lupe Christoph

USE_PERL5 doesn't be removed, it just been put after _DEPENDS by
portlint's warning.

But this PR have serious trouble.  It contains test results in
pkg-plist.  And it use RC_SUBR but put file into pkg-plist.

/var/log/munin-main issue is another wrong point, and DATADIR is
also my fault.

I believe that this PR should be closed and we should use Lupe's
patch. (add USE_PERL5 reorder patch to avoid portlint's warning)

Thanks,

-- 
* Gea-Suan Lin                                    http://blog.gslin.org/
* If you cannot convince them, confuse them.           -- Harry S Truman
